productDisplayName: OTLS Unisex Blue Dual Flap Bag
description: Navy blue and brown, fabric and synthetic leather, dual flap sling bag with one main compartment Has an organizer sleeve inside and a flap with magnetic button closure Second compartment with an zipped insert pocket inside, flap with magnetic button closure Adjustable buckles with a tang clasp, at the sides, on the front Single adjustable strap and a short handle
